content.text:
Task 1 (Lexer) completed with **100.00/100.00** - all 74 test cases passed perfectly.

Key implementation:
- **SYsULexer.g4**: Added all C token rules (keywords, operators, hex constants, comments)
- **main.cpp**: Implemented preprocessing directive parsing for filename/line tracking, StartOfLine/LeadingSpace detection, and clang-compatible output formatting

Ready for Task 2.
